pr.title: Remove Aider workflow automation
pr.body:
## Summary
This PR removes the Aider issue fix workflow that was used for automated code generation and fixes.

## Changes
- Deleted `.github/workflows/aider.yml` - the GitHub Actions workflow that automated issue fixing using the Aider CLI tool with Claude AI models

## Details
The removed workflow provided a manual dispatch mechanism to automatically fix GitHub issues by:
- Accepting issue numbers and model selection as inputs
- Fetching issue content and combining it with predefined instructions
- Running Aider with linting and testing commands
- Creating pull requests with the automated fixes

This workflow is no longer needed and has been removed from the repository.

https://claude.ai/code/session_013kB13jCkTA5mGdLC61xjUM
pr.author: zachmayer
